activeDG.title: Release v0.3.17 packaging DG-123 A + DG-123.0.1 + DG-123.0.2 (R18 v1 Interaction Graph Layer + telemetry + critical TS ESM resolver fix)
activeDG.baseline_8d_classification_preamble: H1.5-implicit: R18 v1 infra works structurally (colony-db.ts + cli-runner.ts role=library imports=1 importedBy=3 symbols=14/9 vs pre-fix 0/0 role=entry), LLM rationales deeper technically (eval-usage 'conditionally access __filename', taint-command-injection 'spawn env option, no shell') pero NO citan graph section keywords explicitly. Findings intra-file SENTINEL son estructuralmente redundantes vs graph context. R18 v1 real value emerges en cross-module findings (R18 v2 backlog).
